_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting AI impact assessments, including risk tiering, harm identification, bias evaluation, human oversight documentation, and residual risk determination.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI AG domain. Skill AG-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AG-S-003 (AG, cosine: 0.624), RM-A-001 (RM, cosine: 0.621).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.2/10 (raw 0.625). Shared vocabulary: [assessments, risk, skill]. NICE-only terms [interpreting] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, bias, conducting, determination, documentation, evaluation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.899 (P=0.934, R=0.868). P exceeds R by 0.067 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Skill in interpreting risk assessments" and "Skill in conducting AI impact assessments, including risk tiering, harm identifi" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.637 ≈ STS 0.625 (gap 0.012). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [assessments, risk, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 20.0%. Shared tokens: [assessments, risk, skill]. NICE-only: [interpreting]. WIDAI-only: [ai, bias, conducting, determination, documentation, evaluation].
